response._raw_text:
<!doctype html>

<!--suppress ALL -->
<html xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml">
  <head>
  	<title>流量数据</title>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta http-equiv="X-UA-Compatible" content="IE=edge,chrome=1" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, target-densitydpi=160, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, minimum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" />
    <meta name="format-detection" content="telephone=no" />
    <title>ebk</title>
    <script>
      Object.defineProperty(window, "self", {
        value: window,
        configurable: false,
        writable: false,
      });
    </script>
    <!-- <script type="text/javascript" th:src="${splider_sdt}"></script> -->

    <script type="text/javascript" src="/datacenter/js/dist/url.min.js?v=20250402.1421"></script>

    
      <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="//static.tripcdn.com/modules/EBooking/ebk-common-plugin/bootstrap/bootstrap-3.3.7.min.css" />
      <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="https://ws-s.tripcdn.cn/modules/EBooking/reshotelebooking-common/1.0.8/css/ebk_basic.css" />
      <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="https://ws-s.tripcdn.cn/modules/EBooking/reshotelebooking-common/1.0.8/css/extra.css" />
      <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="https://ws-s.tripcdn.cn/modules/EBooking/reshotelebooking-common/1.0.8/css/iconfont.css" />
      <link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="/datacenter/css/inland/dateCenter.css?v=20250402.1421" />
      <style>
        .hidden {
          display: none;
        }
        .ebk-ctrip-container .content {
          width: auto;
        }
      </style>

      <script type="text/javascript" crossorigin="anonymous" src="//static.tripcdn.com/cdnjs/jquery/1.9.1/jquery.min.js'"></script>
      <script type="text/javascript" src="//static.tripcdn.com/cdnjs/knockout/3.3.0/knockout-min.js"></script>

        type="text/javascript"
        th:src="${ebkPluginPath}+'/other-plugins/md5.min.js'"

next_actions: price_inventory: 还没有证据包，需补 Request URL / Payload / Preview-Response / 页面上下文 / 酒店日期参数。
promotion: 还没有证据包，需补 Request URL / Payload / Preview-Response / 页面上下文 / 酒店日期参数。
settlement_finance: 还没有证据包，需补 Request URL / Payload / Preview-Response / 页面上下文 / 酒店日期参数。
contract_mice_rfp: 还没有证据包，需补 Request URL / Payload / Preview-Response / 页面上下文 / 酒店日期参数。
traffic_report: 已有证据包但不完整，先补齐 missing_evidence 后再进入字段映射审核。

auth_status.message: No login page detected in captured page URLs.

checks.message: Capture must not be a Ctrip login page or partial login redirect.
Capture must include business XHR/fetch responses.
Capture must produce rows that can feed SUXIOS OTA analytics.
Requested Ctrip sections must hit their cataloged formal endpoints.
